content.problemStatement:
Tyrion is learning game theory to impress the queen.Lord Varys wanted to test the learning of Tyrion so he presented him with a problem on min-max. Help Tyrion in solving the problem.

Given a tree with NNN nodes rooted at node 111. Each node (UUU) of the tree is associated with a pair of values (AU,BU)(A_U, B_U)(AU‚Äã,BU‚Äã). You need to find the value of result (RRR).

R=‚àëU=1N‚àëV=1NF(U,V)\\
R \qquad = \qquad \displaystyle\sum\limits_{U=1}^{N}\displaystyle\sum\limits_{V=1}^{N} F(U, V) \\R=U=1‚àëN‚ÄãV=1‚àëN‚ÄãF(U,V)

F(U,V)={MIN(MAX(AU,AV),MAX(BU,BV))if‚ÄâV‚Äâlies‚Äâin‚Äâsubtree‚Äâof‚ÄâU0otherwiseF(U,V) = \left\{\begin{matrix}
 MIN( MAX(A_U, A_V), MAX(B_U, B_V) ) &  if\, V\, lies\, in\, subtree\, of\, U  \\
0 & otherwise
\end{matrix}\right.F(U,V)={MIN(MAX(AU‚Äã,AV‚Äã),MAX(BU‚Äã,BV‚Äã))0‚ÄãifVliesinsubtreeofUotherwise‚Äã

###Input:


First line will contain one integer NNN denoting number of nodes in the tree.
Second line will contain NNN space separated integers A1,A2,A3......ANA_1, A_2, A_3 ...... A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,A3‚Äã......AN‚Äã.
Third line will contain NNN space separated integers B1,B2,B3......BNB_1, B_2, B_3 ...... B_NB1‚Äã,B2‚Äã,B3‚Äã......BN‚Äã.
Each of the next N‚àí1N - 1N‚àí1 lines will contain 2 space separated integers UUU and VVV denoting that there is an edge between node UUU and VVV.
###Output:
Output in a single line value of result RRR.

###Constraints


1‚â§N‚â§1051 \leq N \leq 10^51‚â§N‚â§105
1‚â§A[i],B[i]‚â§1091 \leq A[i], B[i] \leq 10^91‚â§A[i],B[i]‚â§109
1‚â§U,V‚â§N1 \leq U, V \leq N1‚â§U,V‚â§N
U‚âÝVU \ne VUÓÄÝ=V
###Sample Input:

`5
1 4 5 2 3
5 2 4 1 3
1 2
1 3
2 4
2 5
`###Sample Output:

`30
`###EXPLANATION:
F(1,1)=MIN(MAX(A1,A1),MAX(B1,B1))=1F(1, 1) = MIN(MAX(A_1, A_1), MAX(B_1, B_1)) = 1F(1,1)=MIN(MAX(A1‚Äã,A1‚Äã),MAX(B1‚Äã,B1‚Äã))=1
F(1,2)=MIN(MAX(A1,A2),MAX(B1,B2))=4F(1, 2) = MIN(MAX(A_1, A_2), MAX(B_1, B_2)) = 4F(1,2)=MIN(MAX(A1‚Äã,A2‚Äã),MAX(B1‚Äã,B2‚Äã))=4
F(1,3)=MIN(MAX(A1,A3),MAX(B1,B3))=5F(1, 3) = MIN(MAX(A_1, A_3), MAX(B_1, B_3)) = 5F(1,3)=MIN(MAX(A1‚Äã,A3‚Äã),MAX(B1‚Äã,B3‚Äã))=5
F(1,4)=MIN(MAX(A1,A4),MAX(B1,B4))=2F(1, 4) = MIN(MAX(A_1, A_4), MAX(B_1, B_4)) = 2F(1,4)=MIN(MAX(A1‚Äã,A4‚Äã),MAX(B1‚Äã,B4‚Äã))=2
F(1,5)=MIN(MAX(A1,A5),MAX(B1,B5))=3F(1, 5) = MIN(MAX(A_1, A_5), MAX(B_1, B_5)) = 3F(1,5)=MIN(MAX(A1‚Äã,A5‚Äã),MAX(B1‚Äã,B5‚Äã))=3
F(2,2)=MIN(MAX(A2,A2),MAX(B2,B2))=2F(2, 2) = MIN(MAX(A_2, A_2), MAX(B_2, B_2)) = 2F(2,2)=MIN(MAX(A2‚Äã,A2‚Äã),MAX(B2‚Äã,B2‚Äã))=2
F(2,4)=MIN(MAX(A2,A4),MAX(B2,B4))=2F(2, 4) = MIN(MAX(A_2, A_4), MAX(B_2, B_4)) = 2F(2,4)=MIN(MAX(A2‚Äã,A4‚Äã),MAX(B2‚Äã,B4‚Äã))=2
F(2,5)=MIN(MAX(A2,A5),MAX(B2,B5))=3F(2, 5) = MIN(MAX(A_2, A_5), MAX(B_2, B_5)) = 3F(2,5)=MIN(MAX(A2‚Äã,A5‚Äã),MAX(B2‚Äã,B5‚Äã))=3
F(3,3)=MIN(MAX(A3,A3),MAX(B3,B3))=4F(3, 3) = MIN(MAX(A_3, A_3), MAX(B_3, B_3)) = 4F(3,3)=MIN(MAX(A3‚Äã,A3‚Äã),MAX(B3‚Äã,B3‚Äã))=4
F(4,4)=MIN(MAX(A4,A4),MAX(B4,B4))=1F(4, 4) = MIN(MAX(A_4, A_4), MAX(B_4, B_4)) = 1F(4,4)=MIN(MAX(A4‚Äã,A4‚Äã),MAX(B4‚Äã,B4‚Äã))=1
F(5,5)=MIN(MAX(A5,A5),MAX(B5,B5))=3F(5, 5) = MIN(MAX(A_5, A_5), MAX(B_5, B_5)) = 3F(5,5)=MIN(MAX(A5‚Äã,A5‚Äã),MAX(B5‚Äã,B5‚Äã))=3

Rest of F(U,V)F(U, V)F(U,V) which are not listed above have value 000.

RRR = 1 + 4 + 5 + 2 + 3 + 2 + 2 + 3 + 4 + 1 + 3 = 30

Hence the result is 30.
